title: Debounced Search
constraints: {"type":"Input","desc":"The input field should have an id of 'search'."}
{"type":"Output","desc":"The debouncedSearch function should return a function that calls the original search function after the delay has passed."}
{"type":"Error","desc":"If the delay is set to 0 or less, the function should still debounce."}

starterCode.css: .search-container { @apply w-full p-3 border border-gray-400 rounded-lg; } .search-input { @apply w-full p-3 border border-gray-400 rounded-lg; }

gradingCriteria.description: Does the code correctly implement debouncing for the search input field?
Does the code handle the case where the user interacts with the search field rapidly, resulting in multiple timeouts being set?
Does the code use the setTimeout function to create the timeout?
Does the code handle the case where the delay is set to 0 or less?
Does the code maintain its state during multiple interactions with the search field?
